Code-inspection security audit of micro-tools surface (internal/agent/tools/microtools/: calculator, unit_convert, entity_resolve, location_normalize, openmeteo). Scanned for command/SQL/SSRF injection, hardcoded keys, input validation. Calculator uses safe expression parser (no eval). location_normalize cache keys derived deterministically; openmeteo client uses constant base URL from config — no user-controlled URL paths (SSRF safe). entity_resolve queries graph with parameterized SQL only. Tool envelopes validate input schemas before dispatch. No hardcoded API keys (openmeteo is public/no-auth). OWASP A01/A03/A10: no findings on changed code. Claim Source: interpreted (static code review). Verdict: SECURE.

Portfolio simplify pass (065/066/067/069/074/075). Static scan: go build ./... RC=0 + go vet ./... RC=0 across the full module. Review-only, no behavioral fixes applied — no trivial duplication, dead code, or efficiency hotspots surfaced inside the scope-isolated change boundaries of the in-flight scopes. Foreign blocker F074-04B-CORE-SCENARIO-STARTUP unchanged. Claim Source: executed (build+vet RC=0).

Chaos pass over micro-tools surface. Authored internal/agent/tools/microtools/chaos_065_test.go: seeded PRNG (default seed=65, override via MICROTOOLS_CHAOS_SEED; per-tool streams seed+0|1|2|3), 150 probes per tool (600 total) across calculator (random arithmetic + adversarial garbage), unit_convert (random value/from/to/substance incl. unknown units and Unicode), location_normalize (stub provider yielding 0/1/N candidates and provider errors against multilingual+emoji+whitespace inputs), entity_resolve (fake resolver with deliberately out-of-range scores stressing the [0,1] clamp). Each probe asserts: no panic (recover()), ValidateEnvelopeBytes on raw output, Source.{Provider,Attribution,Kind.Valid} preserved, SchemaVersion pinned, bounded handler error strings. Execution: go test -count=1 -run '^TestChaos065_' -v ./internal/agent/tools/microtools/ RC=0; all 4 tests PASS in 0.047s. No P0–P4 findings produced; capability-foundation invariants hold across 600 stochastic probes. Pre-existing routed findings (F-065-CANARY, F-065-LOCATION-STUB, F-065-MISSING-E2E, F-065-BROADER-SUITE) unrelated to chaos-surface invariants and remain owned by their original owners. Claim Source: executed.

executionHistory.summary: Bootstrapped spec from intent-driven architecture review. Defined actors, outcome contract, 7 BDD scenarios (SCN-065-A01..A07), and acceptance criteria. Hand-off: bubbles.design for design.md, then bubbles.plan for scopes.md.

Created design.md for the generic micro-tools capability foundation, including contracts for location_normalize, unit_convert, calculator, entity_resolve, SST config, observability, security, and scenario-to-test mapping. Routed implementation planning to bubbles.plan.

Created scopes.md, scenario-manifest.json, test-plan.json, report.md, and uservalidation.md for the micro-tool foundation and overlays. Artifact lint passed; transition guard blocked specs_hardened promotion due current worktree source edits, unchecked implementation DoD, missing execution evidence, dependency and retro gates, and guard-required plan detail gaps.

Mode metadata reconciliation only. spec.md declares Workflow Mode: full-delivery (authoritative owner intent set 2026-05-31); prior bubbles.plan run defensively wrote workflowMode=product-to-planning, statusCeiling=specs_hardened, planningOnly=true while operating under a planning-only workflow. Reconciled state.json to workflowMode=full-delivery, statusCeiling=done, planningOnly=false; preserved planMaturityOnly=true because planning artifacts are complete and no implementation evidence exists yet. certification.status remains in_progress; no implementation, test, or certification claims made.

Wired all four micro-tools in cmd/core (entity_resolve via searchEngineEntityResolver adapter; location_normalize via open-meteo geocoder; unit_convert + calculator as deterministic CPU-only tools). Authored microtools_prompt_contract_test.go (PASS), entity_resolve_test.go integration (PASS, 2 functions / 7 sub-tests), microtools_location_test.go integration (authored; live open-meteo, not executed), microtools_http_test.go e2e (authored; not executed). Added entity_resolve to retrieval-qa-v1.yaml allowed_tools and location_normalize to weather-query-v1.yaml allowed_tools; shrunk weather system_prompt 1764→721 bytes (59% reduction, exceeds 40% Success Signal). Three SCOPE-4 DoD items + one SCOPE-2 DoD item flipped to [x] with inline evidence. Remaining DoD items left honestly [ ] with uncertainty declarations. Artifact lint PASSED.

Ran live-stack integration filtered to microtools test functions (full Docker stack: postgres/nats/searxng/ollama/jaeger/stub-providers + smackerel-core/ml images rebuilt). 3 PASS (entity_resolve user-scoped, entity_resolve ambiguity, weather prompt shrink contract) + 2 FAIL (location_normalize stub-providers returns Reykjavik for all inputs; canary detects SCOPE-1 design violation — foundation init() auto-registers concrete tools). Verified on disk that 4 required E2E test functions named in scopes.md Test Plan do NOT exist (TestMicroToolsE2E_SpringfieldProducesClarificationCandidates, TestMicroToolsE2E_WeatherUsesLocationNormalizeBeforeLookup, TestMicroToolsE2E_EntityResolveClarifiesLowConfidenceLease, TestMicroToolsE2E_ComposesWeatherAndUnitConversionWithoutScenarioParsing). E2E run not executed because integration FAILures block certification and missing E2E functions would skip anyway. Result: route_required. Findings F-065-CANARY (bubbles.implement|bubbles.plan), F-065-LOCATION-STUB (bubbles.test|bubbles.implement), F-065-MISSING-E2E (bubbles.test), F-065-BROADER-SUITE (bubbles.validate re-entry). No DoD items flipped this run.
